name: Arcane Disciple
prerequisites: Knowledge (religion) 4 ranks, Spellcraft 4 ranks, deity's alignment
benefit: Add spells from a domain to your class list

name: Aberration Banemagic
description: When you cast a spell that deals damage to an aberration, you deal an extra 2d6 points of damage. A single spell can never gain this extra damage more than once per casting. If the spell allows a saving throw, the DC increases by 2.

name: Aberration Blood
description: One of your ancestors was an aberration and has passed the taint of its aberrant physiology down through the generations to you. You gain a physical feature that grants you a racial bonus on one type of check: Bulging eyes (+2 Spot), Flexible limbs (+2 Grapple), Segmented eyes (+3 Search), Slimy skin (+4 Escape Artist), Sticky fingers (+3 Climb), Tail (+4 Balance), or Webbed hands (+4 Swim).

name: Aberration Wild Shape
description: You can use your wild shape ability to assume the form of an aberration. This otherwise functions identically to your normal wild shape ability. The size of the aberration is limited by the size of animal you can normally assume the shape of with wild shape.

name: Abyss-Bound Soul
description: You have pledged your immortal soul to a particular demon lord in return for a gift that aids your evil works in life. Your evil brand incorporates the personal symbol of your demon lord patron, who watches over you from the Abyss. You gain a +2 bonus on saving throws made against spells with the good descriptor. Additionally, a tiny portion of your patron's power infuses your body, granting you an additional benefit based on your patron.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Adaptive Style
description: Swap readied maneuvers faster

name: Advantageous Avoidance
benefits: You can expend one luck reroll as an immediate action to force a foe to reroll a critical hit confirmation roll made when attacking you. You can expend two luck rerolls as an immediate action to force a foe to reroll an attack roll made against you. You gain one luck reroll per day. Unlike other luck feats, you can use this feat after seeing the success of the roll to be affected.

name: Air Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can shroud yourself in a mantle of air. This effect grants you a +1 sacred (if your deity is good or neutral) or profane (if your deity is evil) bonus to AC. This bonus increases by 1 for every four character levels you possess (maximum +6 at 20th level). In addition, thrown and projectile weapons have an automatic 50% miss chance against you while the air mantle is active. This protection lasts for 1 minute.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each three daily turn or rebuke uses you expend.

name: Aligned Attack
benefits: Choose chaos, good, evil, or law (must match your alignment). When you expend your psionic focus, your successful melee or ranged attack deals an extra 1d6 points of damage and is treated as your chosen alignment for overcoming damage reduction.

name: Ancestral Knowledge
benefits: You can make any Knowledge check untrained, even if the DC is higher than 10. In addition, you can use your Wisdom modifier for any Knowledge check in place of your Intelligence modifier.

name: Animal Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can give yourself the power of a specific animal. Select one of the following abilities each time you activate the feat. Each effect lasts for 1 minute. Ape's Fury: Gain a +2 sacred (if your deity is good or neutral) or profane (if your deity is evil) bonus to your Strength score. The value of this bonus increases by 2 for every six character levels you possess (maximum +8 at 18th level). Cheetah's Sprint: Gain a +5-foot sacred bonus to your base land speed. The value of this bonus increases by 5 feet for every four character levels you possess (maximum +30 feet at 20th level). Hawk's Flight: You can fly as if using the overland flight spell. At 5th level and every five levels thereafter, you gain a +5-foot sacred or profane bonus to your base fly speed (maximum +20 feet at 20th level). Serpent's Strike: You gain a natural bite attack that deals 1d3 points of Constitution damage but no hit point damage. A successful Fortitude save (DC 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Cha modifier) negates the Constitution damage.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each three daily turn or rebuke uses you expend.
You can have multiple abilities active simultaneously. However, you can still activate only one ability per round.

name: Antipsionic Magic
benefits: +2 bonus on caster level checks to overcome psionic creature's power resistance. Psionic creatures make their manifester level check against DC 13 + manifester level to dispel your spells. Exception to psionics-magic transparency.
special: Cannot take this feat if you have the ability to use powers (have a power point reserve or psi-like abilities).

name: Appraise Magic Value

prerequisites.description: Appraise 5 ranks, Knowledge (arcana) 5 ranks, Spellcraft 5 ranks

benefits: If you know that an item is magical, you can use the Appraise skill to identify the item's properties. This use of the Appraise skill requires 8 hours of uninterrupted work and consumes 25 gp worth of special materials. The DC of the Appraise check is 10 + the caster level of the item.

name: Apprentice (Libris Mortis)
description: You have studied under a master and gained knowledge of necromancy.

name: Aquatic Spellcasting
description: Water does not impede your spells. Creatures partially or completely submerged do not gain cover or total cover when you cast a spell from outside the water. The surface does not block line of effect for any spell, including spells with the fire descriptor. You need not make a Spellcraft check to cast a fire spell underwater.

name: Aquatic Shot
description: You can use ranged weapons underwater more effectively. You can use bows and crossbows underwater with a -2 penalty for every 10 feet of water passed through, and water does not provide cover against your ranged attacks when firing from outside the water.

name: Arcane Defense

prerequisites.description: Spell Focus in the chosen school

benefits: You get a +3 bonus on your saving throws against spells from the chosen school. Special: You can gain this feat multiple times, but its effects do not stack. Each time you take the feat, it applies to a new school of magic.

name: Arcane Mastery

prerequisites.description: Ability to cast arcane spells or use spell-like abilities (including invocations)

benefits: You can take 10 on caster level checks (as if the caster level check was a skill check).

name: Arcane Preparation

prerequisites.description: Ability to cast arcane spells without preparation

benefits: Each day, you can use one or more of your spell slots to prepare spells you know, usually for the purpose of applying a metamagic feat to the spell—but without an increase in its casting time. Preparing a spell uses a spell slot of the appropriate level, and once prepared, that slot can't be used for anything else until the prepared spell is cast.

name: Arcane Strike

prerequisites.description: Ability to cast 3rd-level arcane spells, base attack bonus +4

benefits: You can sacrifice a spell to gain +1 on attacks and +1d4 damage per level of the spell sacrificed.

name: Armor Skin
benefits: You gain a +2 natural armor bonus to Armor Class, or your existing natural armor bonus increases by 2.

name: Arterial Strike

prerequisites.description: Sneak attack ability, base attack bonus +4

benefits: You can trade 1d6 sneak attack damage for 1 point of damage per round (bleed damage).

name: Ascetic Hunter
benefits: When you use an unarmed strike to deliver a stunning attack against a favored enemy, you can add one-half your favored enemy bonus on damage rolls to the DC of your stunning attempt. If you have levels in ranger and monk, those levels stack for the purpose of determining your unarmed strike damage. In addition, you can multiclass freely between the monk and ranger classes.

name: Ascetic Knight

prerequisites.description: Improved Unarmed Strike, ability to smite evil

benefits: Your paladin and monk levels stack for the purpose of determining your unarmed strike damage. Your paladin and monk levels also stack when determining the extra damage dealt by your smite evil ability. In addition, you can multiclass freely between the paladin and monk classes.

name: Ascetic Mage

prerequisites.description: Improved Unarmed Strike, ability to spontaneously cast 2nd-level arcane spells

benefits: As a swift action that doesn't provoke attacks of opportunity, you can sacrifice one of your daily allotment of spells to add a bonus to your unarmed strike attack rolls and damage rolls for 1 round. The bonus is equal to the level of the spell sacrificed. If you have levels in sorcerer and monk, those levels stack for the purpose of determining your AC bonus.

name: Ascetic Rogue
benefits: Your monk and rogue levels stack for the purpose of determining your sneak attack damage. When you use an unarmed strike to deliver a sneak attack, you can add your Wisdom bonus to the DC of your stunning attack. In addition, you can multiclass freely between the monk and rogue classes.

name: Ascetic Stalker
benefits: Your monk and ninja levels stack for the purpose of determining the size of your ki pool. Your monk and ninja levels also stack for the purpose of determining your unarmed strike damage, as well as your ki strike class feature. In addition, you can multiclass freely between the monk and ninja classes. You must still remain lawful in order to continue advancing as a monk.

name: Augmented Alchemy
benefits: When creating an alchemical item, you can add +20 to the DC and multiply price by 5 to double damage dealt, double duration, or double area dimensions.

name: Auspicious Marking
benefits: You gain a +2 bonus on all Charisma-based skill checks when dealing with other goliaths. In addition, you can reroll any stabilization check once per turn.

name: Automatic Quicken Spell
benefits: You may cast all 0-, 1st-, 2nd-, and 3rd-level spells as quickened spells without using higher-level spell slots.

name: Automatic Silent Spell
benefits: You may cast all 0-, 1st-, 2nd-, and 3rd-level spells as silent spells without using higher-level spell slots.

name: Automatic Still Spell
benefits: You may cast all 0-, 1st-, 2nd-, 3rd-, 4th-, and 5th-level spells as stilled spells without using higher-level spell slots.

name: Autonomous
benefits: +2 bonus on all Autohypnosis checks and Knowledge (psionics) checks.

name: Awesome Smite

prerequisites.description: Power Attack, base attack bonus +6, smite ability

benefits: This feat allows the use of three tactical maneuvers, each of which requires that you make a smite attack while using the Power Attack feat (minimum attack penalty -1). You must declare the use of this feat before making the attack roll. You can employ only one of these maneuvers at a time. Demolishing Smite: You can ignore a number of points of damage reduction (except DR/— or DR/epic) up to twice your Charisma bonus. Overwhelming Smite: If the attack hits and deals damage, it is treated as a trip attack. Make a Strength check opposed by the defender's Strength or Dexterity. Seeking Smite: You ignore any miss chance your foe might have, though your weapon must still be able to strike the target.

name: Axiomatic Strike
benefits: Deal +2d6 damage with unarmed attacks against chaotic opponents.

name: Azure Enmity
description: You can invest essentia to increase your sneak attack damage.
prerequisites: Sneak attack class feature, ability to invest essentia

name: Azure Talent
description: You can invest essentia to gain extra power points.
prerequisites: Manifester level 1st, ability to invest essentia

name: Azure Toughness
description: You gain bonus hit points equal to your current essentia investment.

name: Azure Turning
description: You can invest essentia to increase your turn undead attempts and effectiveness.
prerequisites: Turn or rebuke undead class feature, ability to invest essentia

name: Azure Wild Shape
description: You can invest essentia to enhance your wild shape ability.
prerequisites: Wild shape class feature, ability to invest essentia

name: Bane of Enemies
benefits: Any weapon you wield against one of your favored enemies is treated as a bane weapon for that creature type.

name: Battle Blessing
benefits: You can cast most of your paladin spells faster than normal. If the spell normally requires a standard action, you can cast it as a swift action. If it normally requires a full round to cast, you can cast it as a standard action. Spells with longer or shorter casting times are not affected by this feat.

name: Battle Caster

prerequisites.description: Ability to ignore arcane spell failure chance from armor

benefits: You are able to wear armor one category heavier than you can normally wear while still avoiding the chance of arcane spell failure. For example, if you have the ability to normally wear light armor without incurring a chance of spell failure, you can wear medium armor and continue to cast spells as normal. This ability does not extend to shields, nor does it apply to spells gained from spellcasting classes other than the class that provides the ability to cast arcane spells while in armor.

name: Battle Hardened
benefits: You gain a +4 bonus on saving throws against fear and a +2 bonus on initiative checks.

name: Bestial Charge

prerequisites.description: Base attack bonus +4, wild shape class feature

benefits: This feat allows the use of three tactical maneuvers, each of which requires that you attempt a charge attack in the round immediately following your shift into animal form using wild shape. Pouncing Charge: You can make a full attack after you charge, as if you had the pounce ability. If the animal form you have assumed normally has the pounce ability, your bonus on attack rolls when charging increases to +3. Striking Charge: You gain an extra 5 feet of reach by suddenly striking forward with your head and neck. You must assume a serpentine animal form to employ this maneuver. Twisting Charge: You can change direction during a charge, as long as you move at least 10 feet both before and after you turn. You must assume an animal form with four or more legs to employ this maneuver.

name: Bestial Hide
description: Your skin is thicker, scalier, or furrier than normal. Your natural armor bonus to AC improves by 1 for every two aberrant feats you possess.

name: Better Lucky than Good
benefits: If you roll a natural 1 when making an attack roll, you can expend one luck reroll as a swift action to instead treat the roll as a natural 20. You can use this feat once per day. You gain one luck reroll per day.

name: Black Lore of Moil
benefits: Any necromancy spell you cast can be cast instead as a Moilian spell, dealing an extra 1d6 points of negative energy damage +1d6 per two spell levels (+1d6 for 1st-level spells, +2d6 for 2nd- or 3rd-level spells, and so on). If the spell normally allows a saving throw, the target takes half the negative energy damage on a successful save, regardless of the outcome of the save on the spell's normal effect. A Moilian spell requires the creation and expenditure of a Moilian runebone, which takes 1 hour to craft and requires special inks and powders costing 25 gp per die of negative energy damage. A Moilian spell uses a spell slot of the spell's normal level.

name: Blackwater Invocation
description: You can call upon negative energy to transform normal water around you into the dark, cold water found at the bottom of deepest ocean trenches. Those entering the water take 1d6 nonlethal cold damage unless protected from cold, and those within gain concealment.

name: Blade Meditation
description: Discipline Focus benefits

name: Blinding Speed
benefits: You can act as if hasted for 5 rounds each day. The duration need not be consecutive rounds.

name: Blindsense
benefits: You can spend one use of your wild shape ability to gain blindsense 30 feet for 1 hour.

name: Blood War Conscript
description: Your evil brand indicates your rank in the armies of the Blood War and infuses you with fury. Against lawful or good enemies, you gain a +1 profane bonus on attack and weapon damage rolls.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Body Fuel
benefits: Recover 2 power points by taking 1 point of ability burn damage to each of Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution. Can recover additional power points proportionally.
special: Only living creatures can use this feat. Must be in your own body.

name: Bolster Resistance
description: Undead you create or raise have greater resistance to turning. Your animated undead gain a bonus to turn resistance.
prerequisites: Corpsecrafter, ability to cast animate dead or create undead

name: Bonus Domain
benefits: You gain access to one additional domain from your deity's domain list. You gain the granted power and can cast one additional domain spell per spell level.

name: Bonus Essentia
description: You gain access to 1 point of essentia.

name: Boost Construct
benefits: When you create an astral construct, you can give it one additional special ability from any menu that the construct currently has an ability from.

name: Born of the Three Thunders
benefits: When you cast a spell with either the electricity descriptor or the sonic descriptor that deals hit point damage, you can declare that spell to be a spell of the three thunders, with half its damage dealt as electricity damage and half dealt as sonic damage. In addition, the spell concludes with a mighty thunderclap that stuns all creatures that take damage from the spell for 1 round unless they succeed on a Fortitude save, then knocks stunned creatures prone unless they succeed on a Reflex save (both saves at the same DC as the base spell). Channeling the three thunders is costly, though, and you are automatically dazed for 1 round after doing so. A three thunders spell uses a spell slot of the spell's normal level.

name: Brachiation
benefits: You can swing through trees at your normal land speed. You must make a Climb check (DC 15) for each move action spent swinging through the trees. A failed Climb check means you make no progress that move action. A Climb check that fails by 5 or more means you fall.

name: Brand of the Nine Hells
description: Gain benefit based on allegiance to a Lord of the Nine
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Breathing Link
description: You can allow a creature adjacent to you to breathe water as a free action. The ability renews automatically until you direct it to another creature or withdraw your power.
prerequisites: Aquatic elf or water genasi, base Will save +2

name: Brutal Throw
benefits: You can use your Strength modifier instead of your Dexterity modifier on attack rolls with thrown weapons.

name: Burrow Friend
benefits: You gain a +2 bonus on Handle Animal and wild empathy checks when dealing with burrowing animals.

name: Burrowing Power
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can manifest powers against targets sheltered behind walls or force effects. Make a Psicraft check (DC 10 + hardness + 1 per foot of thickness) to bypass the barrier. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 2.

name: Catfolk Pounce
benefits: When you charge a flat-footed opponent, you can make a full attack against that opponent.

name: Celestial Bloodline
benefits: You gain resistance to acid 5, cold 5, and electricity 5. If you already have resistance to one or more of these energy types, the resistance increases by 5.

name: Cerulean Fortitude
description: You can invest essentia to increase your Fortitude saves.

name: Cerulean Reflexes
description: You can invest essentia to increase your Reflex saves.

name: Cerulean Will
description: You can invest essentia to increase your Will saves.

name: Chain Power
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can chain any single-target power that deals acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic damage. After the primary target, the power arcs to secondary targets (up to your manifester level, max 20) within 30 feet, each taking half damage. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 6.

name: Chain Spell
benefits: Any spell that specifies a single target and has a range greater than touch can be chained so as to affect that primary target normally, then arc to a number of secondary targets equal to your caster level (maximum 20). Each arc affects one secondary target chosen by you, all of which must be within 30 feet of the primary target, and none of which can be affected more than once. If the chained spell deals damage, the secondary targets each take half as much damage as the primary target (rounded down) and can attempt Reflex saving throws for half damage. For spells that don't deal damage, the save DCs against arcing effects are reduced by 4. A chained spell uses up a spell slot three levels higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Channeled Rage
benefits: While raging, you gain a +4 bonus on saving throws against charm and compulsion effects.

name: Chant of Fortitude

prerequisites.description: Bardic music, Concentration 8 ranks, Perform 8 ranks

benefits: You can use your bardic music to keep allies conscious at negative hit points. Affected allies do not fall unconscious when reduced to negative hit points, and they don't lose 1 hit point each round.

name: Chant of the Long Road
benefits: As a standard action, you can expend one daily use of your bardic music ability to allow yourself and all allies within 60 feet to avoid taking nonlethal damage for hustling. This requires 1 minute of performance, and the effect lasts for 1 hour.

name: Chaos Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can summon the force of chaos to aid you. When you activate this ability, roll 1d6. If the result is odd, add that number as a sacred (if your deity is good or neutral) or profane (if your deity is evil) bonus on your attack rolls until your next action. If the result is even, add that number as a sacred or profane bonus to your AC. At the beginning of each action thereafter, roll the die again and apply the designated bonus. This effect lasts for 1 minute. When you attain 10th level, the die you roll increases to a d8. When you attain 15th level, the die increases to a d10.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each three daily turn or rebuke uses you expend.

name: Chaotic Mind
benefits: Creatures and characters who have insight bonuses (attack, AC, skills, or ability checks) do not gain those bonuses against you. Only applies to psionic insight bonuses (exception to psionics-magic transparency).
special: Cannot take this feat if you have the ability to use powers.

name: Chaotic Rage
benefits: Any weapon you wield while in a rage is treated as a chaotic weapon (deals +2d6 damage against lawful creatures).

name: Chaotic Spell Recall
description: A few choice spells never stray far from your mind. Once per day, you can recall one spell with the chaotic descriptor that you had prepared and then cast. The spell is then prepared again, just as if it had not been cast. You recall the spell as a swift action. You gain an additional daily use of this ability for every two abyssal heritor feats you possess.
prerequisites: Any one Abyssal heritor feat, ability to prepare and cast spells
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Charnel Miasma
benefits: As long as you have a 2nd-level or higher Death domain spell available to cast, you exude an almost imperceptible scent of the grave wherever you go. As a standard action, you can force one foe within 30 feet to attempt a Will save or be shaken for 1 minute. If you use this ability on an already shaken creature and it fails its saving throw, it becomes panicked for 1 minute or until it spends 1 full round out of line of sight of you. Creatures that succeed on this save are not affected again by your charnel miasma for 24 hours. As a secondary benefit, you gain a +1 competence bonus to your caster level when casting death spells.

name: Chord of Distraction
benefits: As an immediate action, you can expend three daily uses of your bardic music ability to distract an opponent. The target must be within 30 feet of you and able to hear or see you. Make a Perform check, opposed by the target's Sense Motive check. If you succeed, that opponent is rendered flat-footed against an ally of your choice. The effect lasts until that opponent is attacked or until the start of your next turn, whichever comes first.

name: Clan Prestige
benefits: You gain a +4 bonus on all Charisma-based skill checks when dealing with members of your clan.

name: Clarion Commander
description: Advanced White Raven tactics

name: Claws of the Beast
description: Your hands are twisted like claws. This deformity allows you to deal more damage than usual with your unarmed strikes and sneak attacks. Your natural weapons or unarmed strikes gain a +1 profane bonus on damage rolls. This bonus increases by 1 for every two Abyssal heritor feats you possess.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Cleave
description: Make an additional attack after dropping a foe.
benefits: If you deal a creature enough damage to make it drop, you get an immediate extra melee attack against another creature.

name: Clever Wrestling

prerequisites.description: Small or Medium size, Improved Unarmed Strike

benefits: Gain circumstance bonus to escape grapple from larger creatures (+2 Large, +4 Huge, +6 Gargantuan, +8 Colossal).

name: Clever Wrestling
description: You have a better than normal chance to escape or wriggle free from a big creature's grapple or pin. You gain a circumstance bonus on grapple checks to escape based on opponent size (+2 Large, +4 Huge, +6 Gargantuan, +8 Colossal).
prerequisites: Small or Medium size, Improved Unarmed Strike

name: Climb Like an Ape
benefits: You can spend one use of your wild shape ability to gain a climb speed equal to your land speed for 1 hour.

name: Cloak Dance
benefits: Take a move action to gain concealment until your next turn. Alternatively, take a full-round action to gain total concealment until your next action.

name: Cloak of the Obyrith
description: The chaos of the Abyss suffuses your being, as it does the ancient obyriths. You gain damage reduction 1/lawful. The amount of damage reduction increases by 1 for each additional Abyssal heritor feat you possess.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Close-Quarters Fighting
benefits: Gain attack of opportunity whenever an enemy attempts to grapple you, even if they have Improved Grapple. If you deal damage, they fail to start the grapple unless they have Improved Grapple or improved grab.

name: Closed Mind
benefits: +2 bonus on all saving throws to resist psionic powers and psi-like abilities. Exception to psionics-magic transparency.
special: Cannot take this feat if you have the ability to use powers.

name: Cobalt Charge
description: You can invest essentia to increase your damage when charging.

name: Cobalt Critical
description: You can invest essentia to increase your critical threat range.

name: Cobalt Expertise
description: You can invest essentia to gain bonuses when using Combat Expertise.
prerequisites: Combat Expertise, ability to invest essentia

name: Cobalt Power
description: You can invest essentia to increase your damage with Power Attack.
prerequisites: Power Attack, ability to invest essentia

name: Cobalt Precision
description: You can invest essentia to increase your attack rolls.

name: Cobalt Rage
description: You can invest essentia to enhance your rage ability.
prerequisites: Rage class feature, ability to invest essentia

name: Combat Archery
benefits: You can attack with a ranged weapon while moving and can take a full attack action with a ranged weapon even while moving.

name: Combat Casting
description: +4 bonus on Concentration checks to cast defensively.
benefits: You get a +4 bonus on Concentration checks made to cast a spell or use a spell-like ability while on the defensive or while you are grappling or pinned.

name: Combat Intuition

prerequisites.description: Sense Motive 4 ranks, base attack bonus +5

benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls against an opponent you fought in the preceding round. You also gain a +4 bonus on Sense Motive checks made to assess opponents.

name: Combat Manifestation
benefits: +4 bonus on Concentration checks made to manifest a power or use a psi-like ability while on the defensive or while grappling or pinned.

name: Communicator
benefits: An innate talent for magic grants you the following spell-like abilities as a 1st-level caster: 1/day—arcane mark, comprehend languages, message.

name: Complementary Insight
benefits: When you have at least 5 ranks in two skills that work well together (such as Bluff and Diplomacy, or Search and Spot), you gain a +2 bonus on checks with both skills when they're used in conjunction.

name: Concussion Attack
benefits: Your successful sneak attack imposes a –2 penalty on the target's Intelligence and Wisdom checks, as well as on any Intelligence- and Wisdom-based skill checks, for 10 rounds. Using this feat reduces your sneak attack damage by 2d6.

name: Cool Head
benefits: You immediately learn up to two mental skill tricks at no cost, and your limit on skill tricks known increases by one.

name: Cooperative Spell
benefits: While the two of you are adjacent, you and another spellcaster with the Cooperative Spell feat can simultaneously cast the same spell at the same time in the round. Add +2 to the save DC of cooperatively cast spells and +1 to caster level checks to beat the target's spell resistance (if any), using the higher base DC and level check of either caster. A cooperative spell uses up a spell slot of the same level as the spell's actual level. Special: For each additional caster with this feat casting the same cooperative spell simultaneously, the spell's save DC and the bonus on the caster level check both increase by 1.

name: Corpsecrafter
description: You can create more powerful undead through the use of necromantic energy. When you create undead, they gain additional abilities.
prerequisites: Spell Focus (necromancy), ability to cast animate dead or create undead

name: Cougar's Vision
benefits: You can spend one use of your wild shape ability to gain low-light vision for 1 hour.

name: Craft Cognizance Crystal
benefits: You can create cognizance crystals that store power points.

name: Craft Contingent Spell
benefits: You can attach semipermanent spells to a creature and set them to activate under certain conditions. Crafting a contingent spell takes one day for each 1,000 gp in its base price (spell level × caster level × 100 gp). To craft a contingent spell, you must spend 1/25 of this base price in XP and use up raw materials costing one-half the base price.

name: Craft Dorje
benefits: You can create dorjes (slender crystal wands) that manifest powers when charges are expended.

name: Craft Epic Magic Arms and Armor
benefits: You can craft magic arms and armor which exceed the normal +10 limit.

name: Craft Epic Rod
benefits: You can craft epic rods.

name: Craft Epic Staff
benefits: You can craft epic staffs.

name: Craft Epic Wondrous Item
benefits: You can craft epic wondrous items.

name: Craft Psicrown
benefits: You can create psicrowns, which have multiple psionic effects.

name: Craft Psionic Arms and Armor
benefits: You can create psionic weapons, armor, and shields.

name: Craft Psionic Construct
benefits: You can create psionic constructs (golems and other automatons) that obey your orders.

name: Craft Universal Item
benefits: You can create universal psionic items, such as a third eye or psychoactive skin.

name: Curling Wave Strike
description: If you trip an opponent in melee combat, you can immediately make another trip attempt against another foe within reach at the same attack bonus. This replaces the free attack from Improved Trip.

name: Damage Reduction
benefits: You gain damage reduction 3/-, or your existing damage reduction increases by 3.

name: Danger Sense
benefits: Once per day, you may reroll an initiative check you have just made. You must accept the result of the reroll, even if it's worse than the original roll.

name: Daredevil Athlete
benefits: Three times per day, you can use an immediate action to gain a +5 competence bonus on a single Balance, Climb, Escape Artist, Jump, Ride, Swim, or Tumble check.

name: Daring Outlaw
benefits: Your rogue and swashbuckler levels stack for the purpose of determining your competence bonus on Reflex saves from the grace class feature and the swashbuckler's dodge bonus to AC. Your rogue and swashbuckler levels also stack for the purpose of determining your sneak attack bonus damage.

name: Daring Warrior
benefits: Your fighter and swashbuckler levels stack for the purpose of determining your competence bonus on Reflex saves from the grace class feature and the swashbuckler's dodge bonus to AC. Your fighter and swashbuckler levels also stack for the purpose of qualifying for feats that require a minimum fighter level, such as Greater Weapon Focus.

name: Dark Speech
description: You learn a smattering of the language of truly dark power. You can use the Dark Speech to bring loathing and fear to others, to help cast evil spells and create evil magic items, and to weaken physical objects. The four basic uses are: Dread (inspire fear), Power (enhance spells/items), Corruption (reduce hardness), and Dark Unity (control swarms).
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Darkstalker
description: When you hide, creatures with blindsense, blindsight, scent, or tremorsense must make a Listen check or a Spot check (whichever DC is higher) to notice you, just as sighted creatures would make Spot checks to detect you. You cannot hide in plain sight unless you have that ability as a class feature. In addition, you can flank creatures that have the all-around vision special quality.

name: Dash
benefits: If wearing light armor or no armor and carrying a light load, your speed increases by 5 feet.

name: Daylight Adaptation
benefits: You lose light blindness or light sensitivity racial traits. If you have light sensitivity, you no longer take penalties in bright light.

name: Deadly Defense
benefits: When fighting defensively, you deal an extra 1d6 points of damage with any light weapon or with any weapon to which the Weapon Finesse feat applies. This feat's benefit applies only when you are unarmored or wearing light armor and not using a shield. If you have the Combat Expertise feat, you also gain the benefit of Deadly Defense when taking a penalty of at least –2 on your attack roll from that feat.

name: Deadly Precision
benefits: You can reroll any result of 1 on your sneak attack's extra damage dice. Must keep the result of the reroll.

name: Deafening Strike
benefits: Your successful sneak attack causes the target to be deafened for 3 rounds. Using this feat reduces your sneak attack damage by 3d6.

name: Death Blow
benefits: You can perform a coup de grace as a standard action (rather than a full-round action).

name: Death Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can cause one of your melee weapons to radiate negative energy for 1 minute. When you make a successful attack with this weapon, the target must succeed on a Fortitude save (DC 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Cha modifier) or gain a negative level. You can bestow only one negative level per target for every four character levels you possess (minimum one, maximum five negative levels at 20th level).
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each three daily turn or rebuke uses you expend.

name: Death's Embrace
description: You have a close affinity with negative energy and are treated as undead for some effects.

name: Deep Impact
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can resolve your melee weapon attack as a touch attack. Must decide before making the attack.

name: Deepspawn
description: Two short but powerful tentacles sprout from your waist. You gain two tentacle natural attacks that each deal 1d4 points of damage (for a Medium creature) plus your Strength modifier. The tentacle attacks are treated as primary weapons. You gain a +2 racial bonus on grapple checks.
prerequisites: Aberration Blood, one other aberrant feat

name: Defensive Strike
benefits: If an opponent attacks you and misses while you are using total defense, you can attack that opponent on your next turn with a +4 bonus on your attack roll.

name: Defensive Throw

prerequisites.description: Dex 13, Combat Reflexes, Dodge, Improved Trip, Improved Unarmed Strike

benefits: If the opponent you chose for your Dodge feat attacks you and misses, you can make an immediate trip attack. This counts against your attacks of opportunity.

name: Deft Opportunist
benefits: You get a +4 bonus on attack rolls when making attacks of opportunity.

name: Deft Strike

prerequisites.description: Int 13, Spot 10 ranks, Combat Expertise, sneak attack

benefits: When you use Combat Expertise to gain a dodge bonus to your Armor Class, you also ignore an amount of your opponent's armor bonus and natural armor bonus equal to the dodge bonus you gain from Combat Expertise.

name: Delay Power
benefits: You can manifest a power as a standard action and delay its effect up to 5 rounds. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 2.

name: Delay Spell
benefits: When casting a spell, you set a delay of 1 to 5 rounds before it takes effect. The delay time cannot be changed once set; the spell activates just before your turn on the round you designate. Only area, personal, and touch spells can be affected by this feat. Any decisions you would make about the spell (including attack rolls, designating targets, or determining or shaping an area) are decided when the spell is cast, with any of its effects (including damage and saving throws) decided when the spell triggers. A delayed spell uses up a spell slot three levels higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Demon Mastery
description: You are particularly skilled at summoning demons and convincing them to serve you. You gain a +2 bonus on Charisma checks made to resolve the effects of planar binding and similar spells. Additionally, whenever you use a spell to summon a demon, your effective caster level increases by 1 for the purpose of resolving its effects.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Demonic Conduit
description: Your evil brand incorporates blasphemous runes and sigils that augment magical attacks you make against lawful and/or good targets. The save DC for any spell you cast against a lawful or good creature increases by 1. Against lawful good targets, the save DC increases by 2.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Demonic Skin
description: Your skin has rough, scaly patches that enhance your natural armor. Your natural armor bonus improves by 1. This improvement increases by 1 for every two Abyssal heritor feats you possess. If you do not have natural armor, assume your natural armor bonus is +0.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Demonic Sneak Attack
description: You know exactly how to twist the blade to get the most out of your sneak attacks. When you make a successful sneak attack, you can reroll a number of sneak attack damage dice equal to the number of Abyssal heritor feats you possess. You must take the results of the rerolled dice.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Desert Wind Dodge
description: Bonuses while in Desert Wind stance

name: Destruction Devotion
benefits: Once per day as an immediate action, you can call upon the forces of destruction to weaken your opponents' defenses. If you deal damage with a melee attack (but not a melee touch attack) while this ability is active, you temporarily reduce the struck opponent's armor bonus or natural armor bonus by 1. Reductions from multiple hits stack, to a minimum bonus of +0. If the opponent has both armor and natural armor bonuses, it chooses which one to reduce. Once one bonus reaches +0, the other bonus automatically gets reduced until it too reaches +0 or the effect ends. This effect lasts for 1 minute. Upon reaching 10th level, you reduce your opponent's armor or natural armor bonus by 2 per successful hit.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each daily turn or rebuke use you expend.

name: Destructive Rage
benefits: While raging, gain +8 bonus on Strength checks to break down doors or break objects.

name: Destructive Retribution
description: Undead you create explode when destroyed. When an undead you created is destroyed, it releases a burst of negative energy.
prerequisites: Corpsecrafter, ability to cast animate dead or create undead

name: Devastating Critical
benefits: When using the chosen weapon, whenever you score a critical hit the target must make a Fortitude save (DC 10 + 1/2 character level + Str modifier) or die instantly.

name: Devil's Aura
description: Create aura of fear for 1 round
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Devil's Favor
description: +2 bonus on attack, save, or check 1/day per devil-touched feat you have
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Devil's Flesh
description: Gain bonus to natural armor and Intimidate based on number of devil-touched feats you have
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Devil's Sight
description: Gain darkvision 60 ft. and blindsight 30 ft. for 5 rounds 1/day per devil-touched feat you have
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Devil's Stamina
description: Gain 2 hp per devil-touched feat you have, and 1/day fast healing equal to number of devil-touched feats you have for 5 rounds
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Devil's Tongue
description: Daze one creature as standard action 1/day per devil-touched feat you have
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Devoted Bulwark
description: Better defense in Devoted Spirit stance

name: Devoted Inquisitor
benefits: When you use your smite evil ability, you can also use your sneak attack ability to daze your opponent. On a successful sneak attack against an evil creature that you have used smite evil on, the target is dazed for 1 round (in addition to the extra sneak attack damage).

name: Devoted Performer
benefits: Your paladin and bard levels stack for the purpose of determining the extra damage dealt by your smite evil ability and the effects of your bardic music abilities.

name: Devoted Tracker
benefits: Your special mount becomes your animal companion, and your paladin and ranger levels stack for the purpose of determining the extra damage dealt by your smite evil ability and the effects of your wild empathy ability.

name: Dexterous Fortitude
benefits: Once per round, when targeted by an effect requiring a Fortitude save, you may make a Reflex save instead.

name: Dexterous Will
benefits: Once per round, when targeted by an effect requiring a Will save, you may make a Reflex save instead.

name: Dilate Aura
description: Once/encounter, double range of your aura
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Dire Charge
benefits: If you charge a foe during the first round of combat, you can make a full attack against the opponent you charge.

name: Disemboweling Strike
benefits: Your successful sneak attack with a slashing weapon for which you have selected Weapon Focus deals 1d4 points of Constitution damage in addition to its normal damage. You can't use this feat against the same target more than once per day. Using this feat reduces your sneak attack damage by 4d6.

name: Disguise Spell
benefits: You can cast spells unobtrusively as part of a performance. Observers don't automatically detect your spellcasting, but they can make a Spot check (DC 20 + spell level) to notice the casting.

name: Disrupting Spell
description: Your spell interferes with the spellcasting of an enemy
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Distant Horizon
description: Advanced Setting Sun tactics

name: Distant Shot
benefits: You can shoot or throw ranged weapons at any target you can see with no penalty for range.

name: Dive for Cover
benefits: You can make one retry on a failed Reflex save. You must accept the result of the reroll, even if it's worse than the original roll. After using this feat, you are prone.

name: Divine Might

prerequisites.description: Turn or rebuke undead ability, Str 13, Power Attack

benefits: Spend a turn/rebuke attempt to gain bonus to melee damage equal to your Charisma bonus for 1 round.

name: Divine Vengeance

prerequisites.description: Turn or rebuke undead ability, Extra Turning

benefits: Spend a turn/rebuke attempt and Extra Turning feat to add 2d6 damage to your next melee attack.

name: Divine Vigor
benefits: Spend a turn/rebuke attempt to gain bonus to hit points and speed equal to your Charisma bonus for 1 minute.

name: Divine Censure
description: Cause evil outsiders to become shaken
prerequisites: Ability to turn undead, good alignment
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Divine Defiance
description: Counter enemy's spell as an immediate action
prerequisites: Divine caster level 3rd, ability to turn or rebuke undead
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Divine Justice
description: Deal +2d6 damage with melee attacks against evil outsiders for 1 round
prerequisites: Ability to turn or rebuke undead
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Divine Necromancer
description: You can use your divine magic to enhance your necromancy spells.
prerequisites: Spell Focus (necromancy), ability to cast 3rd-level divine spells

name: Divine Soultouch
description: You can invest essentia to improve your ability to turn or rebuke undead.
prerequisites: Turn or rebuke undead, ability to invest essentia

name: Dodge
description: +1 dodge bonus to AC against one opponent.
benefits: During your action, you designate an opponent and receive a +1 dodge bonus to Armor Class against attacks from that opponent.

name: Double Wand Wielder
benefits: As a full-round action, you can wield a wand in each hand (if you have both hands free), with one wand designated as your primary wand and the other your secondary wand. Each use of the secondary wand expends 2 charges from it instead of 1.

name: Draconic Aura
benefits: You gain an aura that provides bonuses to you and allies within 30 feet based on your dragon type.

name: Draconic Breath
benefits: As a standard action, you can change arcane spell energy into a breath weapon of your draconic heritage energy type. The breath weapon is a 30-foot cone (fire or cold) or a 60-foot line (acid or electricity) that deals 2d6 points of damage per level of the spell that you expended to create the effect. Any creature in the area can make a Reflex save (DC 10 + level of the spell used + your Cha modifier) for half damage. This is a supernatural ability.

name: Draconic Claw
benefits: You gain claws. You can make a natural attack with your claw, dealing damage based on your size (Small 1d4, Medium 1d6, Large 1d8). In any round when you cast a spell with a casting time of 1 standard action, you can make a single claw attack as a swift action against an opponent you threaten.

name: Draconic Flight
benefits: After you cast an arcane spell with a casting time of 1 standard action, you gain a fly speed equal to 10 feet per level of the spell you just cast for the remainder of your turn.

name: Draconic Heritage
benefits: Choose one dragon type and gain the indicated skill as a class skill. You gain a bonus on saving throws against sleep and paralysis, as well as spells and abilities with the energy type of your Draconic Heritage. This bonus is equal to the number of draconic feats you have.

name: Draconic Legacy
benefits: Based on your draconic heritage, you add specific spells to your list of spells known. Each spell is added at the level that a spellcaster would normally gain it unless otherwise indicated.

name: Draconic Power
benefits: Your caster level increases by 1, and you add 1 to the save DC of all arcane spells with the energy descriptor of the same energy type as determined by your draconic heritage.

name: Draconic Presence
benefits: Whenever you cast an arcane spell, all opponents within 10 feet of you who have fewer Hit Dice than you become shaken for a number of rounds equal to the level of the spell you cast. The effect is negated by a Will save (DC 10 + level of the spell cast + your Cha modifier). A successful save indicates that the opponent is immune to your draconic presence for 24 hours.

name: Draconic Resistance
benefits: You gain resistance to the energy type of your draconic heritage equal to three times the number of draconic feats you currently have (including draconic feats you take after gaining this feat).

name: Draconic Skin
benefits: Your natural armor increases by 1.

name: Dragon Wild Shape
benefits: You may use wild shape to change into a dragon (black, blue, green, red, white, brass, bronze, copper, gold, or silver).

name: Dragon Wings
benefits: You grow dragon wings and gain a fly speed of 60 feet with average maneuverability.

name: Dragonborn Heritage
benefits: You gain additional benefits based on your draconic heritage. Your breath weapon deals an additional 1d6 damage.

name: Dragonborn Mastery
benefits: The save DC of your breath weapon increases by 2, and you can use your breath weapon one additional time per day.

name: Dragontouched
benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on saving throws against sleep, paralysis, and breath weapons.

name: Dual Strike
benefits: As a standard action, you can make one attack with both your primary and secondary weapons. Both attacks use your highest base attack bonus, and you apply the normal penalties for fighting with two weapons.

name: Dumb Luck
benefits: If you roll a natural 1 when making a saving throw, you can expend one luck reroll as an immediate action to instead treat the roll as a natural 20. You can use this feat once per day. You gain one luck reroll per day.

name: Durable Form
description: You are much more resilient than the fragile humanoids that do not share your aberrant heritage. You gain 2 hit points for each aberrant feat you have.

name: Dwarven Armor Proficiency
benefits: You gain proficiency with dwarven exotic armors (battle plate and mountain plate).

name: Eagle Claw Attack

prerequisites.description: Wis 13, Improved Sunder, Improved Unarmed Strike

benefits: Add your Wisdom bonus to damage when making unarmed strikes against objects.

name: Earth Adept
benefits: If both you and your foe are touching the ground, you gain a +1 bonus on damage rolls.

name: Earth Devotion
benefits: Once per day as an immediate action, you can ignore the effects of difficult terrain or make terrain near you more difficult to move through. If you use this ability on yourself, you can ignore the effects of difficult terrain for 1 minute. This ability also grants you a +5 sacred (if your deity is good or neutral) or profane (if your deity is evil) bonus on Balance, Climb, and Jump checks. If you use this ability to affect nearby terrain, you can change one 5-foot square of earth or stone from normal to difficult terrain for every three character levels you possess (minimum 1 square; maximum 6 squares at 18th level). This change lasts for 1 minute. On attaining 10th level, you can cause stone spikes to grow from any surface you have changed to difficult terrain using this ability. These spikes work like caltrops.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each daily turn or rebuke use you expend.

name: Earth Fist
benefits: While you are touching solid ground, your unarmed attacks are treated as if they were cold iron weapons for the purpose of overcoming damage reduction.

name: Earth Master
benefits: If both you and your foe are touching the ground, you gain a +1 bonus on attack rolls.

name: Earth Sense
benefits: You can sense creatures within 20 feet that are touching the ground, gaining tremorsense with a range of 20 feet.

name: Earth's Embrace

prerequisites.description: Str 15, Improved Grapple or improved grab, Improved Unarmed Strike

benefits: When pinning an opponent, deal an extra 1d12 points of damage each round you maintain the pin.

name: Eldritch Erosion
benefits: Your successful sneak attack reduces the target's spell resistance and power resistance by 5 (minimum 0) for 10 rounds. Using this feat reduces your sneak attack damage by 4d6.

name: Elemental Bloodline
benefits: You gain additional abilities based on your genasi type. See feat description for full details.

name: Elemental Essence

prerequisites.description: Any other wild feat, wild shape class feature

benefits: When you first select this feat, choose one type of energy: acid, cold, electricity, or fire. This choice cannot thereafter be changed. You can spend one daily use of your wild shape ability to surround your limbs and weapons with an aura of the chosen energy. While this effect is active, each melee attack you make deals an extra 1d6 points of the appropriate type of energy damage. Additionally, you gain resistance 5 against that type of energy. These effects last for 1 minute.
special: You can select this feat multiple times. Its effects do not stack. Each time you take it, you must select a different type of energy to which the feat applies. You cannot use this feat to activate multiple energy types at the same time.

name: Elemental Manifestation
benefits: You gain the ability to manifest an elemental aura. See feat description for full details.

name: Elf Dilettante
benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on all untrained skill checks.

name: Elven Spell Lore
benefits: When you cast a spell of a chosen spell school, your caster level is increased by 1. You can select this feat multiple times, choosing a different school each time.

name: Empower Power
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can increase all variable numeric effects of a power by 50%. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 2.

name: Empower Spell
description: Increase spell variables by 50%.
benefits: All variable, numeric effects of an empowered spell are increased by one-half. Empowering a spell uses a spell slot two levels higher.

name: Encysted Soul
description: Your soul is protected within your body, making it difficult for you to be turned into an undead creature against your will.

name: Endure Sunlight
description: You can withstand exposure to sunlight better than other undead.

name: Enduring Ki
benefits: By spending an extra daily use of your ki power when you activate it, the chosen effect lasts for an additional round. You also gain one extra daily use of your ki power.

name: Energy Admixture
benefits: Choose one type of energy (acid, cold, electricity, or fire) that matches an energy type you have selected for substitution via the Energy Substitution feat. You can then modify any spell with an energy descriptor by adding an equal amount of the chosen type of energy to the spell's normal effects. An energy admixed spell uses up a spell slot four levels higher than the spell's actual level. Special: You can gain this feat multiple times, choosing a different type of energy each time.

name: Energy Resistance
benefits: Choose a type of energy (acid, cold, electricity, fire, or sonic). You gain resistance 10 to that energy, or your existing resistance increases by 10.

name: Energy Substitution

prerequisites.description: Knowledge (arcana) 5 ranks, any other metamagic feat

benefits: Choose one type of energy (acid, cold, electricity, or fire). You can then modify any spell with an energy descriptor to use the chosen type of energy instead. An energy substituted spell uses a spell slot of the spell's normal level. The spell's descriptor changes to the new energy type. Special: You can gain this feat multiple times, choosing a different type of energy each time.

name: Enervating Touch
description: Your touch can drain the life force from living creatures.

name: Enhance Spell
benefits: The damage cap for your spells increases by 10 dice (for spells dealing damage equal to caster level) or 5 dice (for spells dealing damage equal to half caster level). Uses a spell slot 4 levels higher.

name: Enhanced Animation
description: You can create more powerful skeletons and zombies.
prerequisites: Corpsecrafter, ability to cast animate dead

name: Enlarge Power
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can double a power's range. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 2.

name: Epic Dodge
benefits: Once per round, when struck by an attack from your dodge target, you automatically avoid all damage.

name: Epic Endurance
benefits: Whenever you make a check for performing a physical action that extends over a period of time, you get a +10 bonus.

name: Epic Fortitude
benefits: You gain a +4 bonus on all Fortitude saving throws.

name: Epic Inspiration
benefits: You can use your bardic music to inspire allies, granting them a +4 morale bonus on attacks and a +4 dodge bonus to AC for up to 1 minute.

name: Epic Leadership
benefits: You attract a cohort and followers as shown on the Epic Leadership table (higher than normal Leadership).

name: Epic of the Lost King
benefits: As a move action, you can expend one daily use of your bardic music ability to remove fatigue from up to three allies (including yourself) within 30 feet. If you spend three daily uses of bardic music, you can remove exhaustion from your allies instead.

name: Epic Prowess
benefits: Gain a +1 bonus on all attack rolls.

name: Epic Reflexes
benefits: You gain a +4 bonus on all Reflex saving throws.

name: Epic Reputation
benefits: You gain a +4 bonus on Bluff, Diplomacy, Gather Information, Intimidate, and Perform checks.

name: Epic Skill Focus
benefits: You gain a +10 bonus on all skill checks with the chosen skill.

name: Epic Spell Focus
benefits: Add +1 to the DC for all saving throws against spells from the school of magic you select (stacks with Spell Focus and Greater Spell Focus).

name: Epic Spell Penetration
benefits: You get a +2 bonus on caster level checks to beat a creature's spell resistance (stacks with Spell Penetration and Greater Spell Penetration).

name: Epic Spellcasting
benefits: You can develop and cast epic spells. You gain access to the Epic Spellcasting system.

name: Epic Toughness
benefits: You gain +30 hit points.

name: Epic Weapon Focus
benefits: Add +2 bonus to all attack rolls you make using the selected weapon (stacks with Weapon Focus).

name: Epic Weapon Specialization
benefits: Add +4 bonus to all damage you deal using the selected weapon (stacks with Weapon Specialization).

name: Evil Devotion
benefits: Once per day as an immediate action, you can surround yourself with an aura of evil that grants you and each of your allies within 30 feet damage reduction that can be overcome only by good-aligned weapons. The numeric value of this damage reduction is 1 + 1/five character levels you possess (maximum 5/good at 20th level). In addition, your and your allies' natural and weapon attacks are evil-aligned for the purpose of overcoming damage reduction. This effect lasts for 1 minute.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each daily turn or rebuke use you expend.

name: Evil Brand
description: You are physically marked forever as the servant of an evil power greater than yourself—in this case, a demon lord. The symbol is unquestionable in its perversity, depicting a depravity so unthinkable that all who see it know beyond a doubt that you serve the lords of the Abyss. Evil creatures automatically recognize the symbol now emblazoned upon you as a sign of your utter depravity. You gain a +2 circumstance bonus on Diplomacy and Intimidate checks made against evil creatures.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Expanded Ki Pool
benefits: You gain three extra daily uses of your ki power.

name: Expanded Knowledge
benefits: Add one additional power to your list of powers known. The power must be of a level you can already manifest.

name: Expanded Soulmeld Capacity
description: One of your soulmelds has an increased essentia capacity.

name: Expert Tactician

prerequisites.description: Dex 13, Combat Reflexes, base attack bonus +2

benefits: Whenever you hit a target with an attack of opportunity, all your allies gain a +2 bonus on attack and damage rolls against that target for 1 round.

name: Expert Swimmer
description: You can hold your breath for 3 rounds per point of Constitution and gain a +4 bonus on Constitution checks to continue holding your breath. On a successful Swim check, you swim your land speed as a full-round action or half your land speed as a move action. Your natural swim speed increases by 10 feet.

name: Explosive Spell
benefits: On a failed Reflex save, an explosive spell ejects any creature caught in its area, sending it to a location outside the nearest edge of that area, dealing additional damage (1d6 points of damage per 10 feet moved) and knocking creatures prone. Explosive Spell can be applied only to spells that allow Reflex saves and affect an area (a cone, cylinder, line, or burst). An explosive spell uses up a spell slot two levels higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Extend Power
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can double a power's duration. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 2.

name: Extend Rage
benefits: Each use of rage or frenzy lasts an additional 5 rounds beyond normal duration. Special: Can be taken multiple times, effects stack.

name: Extra Edge
benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on your warmage edge, plus an additional +1 bonus per four warmage levels.

name: Extra Invocation
benefits: You learn one additional invocation from the list available to you, choosing an invocation of one grade lower than the highest grade of invocation you know. Special: You can gain this feat multiple times.

name: Extra Music
benefits: You can use your bardic music four extra times per day.

name: Extra Rage
benefits: You can rage or frenzy two more times per day. Special: Can be taken multiple times, effects stack.

name: Extra Silence
benefits: You can use your racial silence ability three times per day plus your Charisma bonus (if any) times per day.

name: Extra Slot
benefits: You gain one extra spell slot in your daily allotment, at any level up to one lower than the highest level of spell you can currently cast. Once selected, the extra spell slot never changes level. Special: You can gain this feat multiple times.

name: Extra Smiting
benefits: Gain two extra smite attempts per day. Special: Can be taken multiple times, effects stack.

name: Extra Spell
benefits: You learn one additional spell at any level up to one lower than the highest level of spell you can currently cast. Special: You can gain this feat multiple times. Each time, you learn a new spell at any level up to one lower than the highest level of spell you can cast.

name: Extra Spell Secret

prerequisites.description: Spell secret class ability, able to cast 2nd-level spells

benefits: You choose one spell known to you that becomes permanently modified as though affected by Enlarge Spell, Extend Spell, Still Spell, or Silent Spell. The spell's level does not change. Special: You can take this feat multiple times.

name: Extra Stunning
benefits: Gain three extra stunning attacks per day. Special: Can be taken multiple times, effects stack.

name: Extract Demonic Essence
description: You can draw upon the living essence of a willing or captured demon to fuel the creation of items or the casting of potent spells. Whenever you need to expend experience points to craft a magic item or cast a spell with an XP component, you can draw upon the life force of a nearby demon to reduce the XP cost to you by one-half.
prerequisites: Any two item creation feats, Demon Mastery
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Extraordinary Concentration
benefits: You can concentrate on a spell as a move action or swift action, rather than a standard action.

name: Extraordinary Spell Aim
benefits: You can exclude one creature from the area of an area spell. The creature must be within the spell's area, but it is unaffected by the spell.

name: Eyes in the Back of Your Head
benefits: Attackers do not gain the usual +2 bonus when flanking you. Does not prevent sneak attacks.

name: Eyes of the Abyss
description: Your eyes glow with an inner fire of some unusual color. This glow increases your perception and allows you to see in the dark. You gain darkvision out to a range of 60 feet and a bonus on Search and Spot checks. The amount of this bonus equals the number of Abyssal heritor feats you possess.
prerequisites: Any one other Abyssal heritor feat
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Eyes of the Dead
description: You can see through the eyes of undead creatures you control.
prerequisites: Ability to rebuke or command undead

name: Fade into Violence
benefits: When combat begins, if you have not yet acted, you gain concealment until the end of your first turn.

name: Faith Unswerving
description: Advanced Devoted Spirit tactics

name: Fast Healing
benefits: You gain fast healing 3, or your existing fast healing increases by 3.

name: Faster Healing
benefits: You recover hit points and ability score points faster than normal.

name: Favored Power Attack

prerequisites.description: Favored enemy ability, Power Attack, base attack bonus +4

benefits: When using Power Attack against a favored enemy, add twice the number subtracted (three times if using two hands).

name: Fell Shot
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can resolve your ranged attack as a touch attack. Must decide before making the attack.

name: Fire Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can sheathe your body in red and orange flames. The fire does not harm you, but you illuminate the nearby area as a torch would. While you are thus alight, each of your melee attacks deals 1 extra point of fire damage + 1 point for every three character levels you possess (maximum +7 at 18th level). This effect lasts for 1 minute. Any foe injured by this fire ignites and burns for an additional 1d4 points of fire damage per round unless it succeeds on a Reflex save (DC 10 + 1/2 your character level + your Cha modifier).
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each two daily turn or rebuke uses you expend.

name: Fists of Iron

prerequisites.description: Improved Unarmed Strike, Stunning Fist, base attack bonus +2

benefits: Deal an extra 1d6 damage with unarmed attacks. Each use counts as one Stunning Fist attempt.

name: Fleet of Foot
benefits: When running or charging, you can make a single direction change of 90 degrees or less.

name: Flick of the Wrist

prerequisites.description: Dex 17, Sleight of Hand 5 ranks, Quick Draw

benefits: If you draw a light weapon and attack in the same round, your opponent is flat-footed for that attack only. Once per round, once per opponent per encounter.

name: Flying Kick

prerequisites.description: Str 13, Jump 4 ranks, Improved Unarmed Strike, Power Attack

benefits: Deal an extra 1d12 damage with unarmed attacks when charging.

name: Flying Fish Leap
description: When leaping out of the water with a high jump, you ignore the penalty on the Jump check. You can also fling yourself over the surface of the water, leaping laterally just as far as you leap vertically.

name: Focused Mind
benefits: When you take 10 or take 20 on an Intelligence-based skill check, you gain a +2 bonus on the check.

name: Focused Sunder
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, your sunder attempts ignore half of your opponent's weapon or shield's hardness.

name: Force of Personality
benefits: You add your Charisma modifier instead of your Wisdom modifier to Will saves.

name: Force of Will
benefits: You can make a Will save in place of a Fortitude or Reflex save against any psionic power, psi-like ability, or spell-like ability. Can only use once per round. Only applies to psionic effects.
special: Cannot take this feat if you have the ability to use powers.

name: Forge Epic Ring
benefits: You can forge epic magic rings.

name: Fortify Spell
benefits: A fortified spell is treated as having a higher caster level for the purpose of defeating a target's spell resistance. You prepare and cast the spell in a higher-level spell slot than normal, with each additional level giving a +2 bonus on spell penetration checks for the altered spell. A fortified spell uses up a spell slot at least one level higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Fortuitous Strike
benefits: You can expend one luck reroll as a swift action to reroll a weapon damage roll. You can expend two luck rerolls as a swift action to reroll an attack roll. You gain one luck reroll per day.

name: Fragile Construct
benefits: As long as you have a 3rd-level or higher Destruction domain spell available to cast, you can enhance the inherent flaws of objects. Using this ability requires a touch or a melee touch attack (if used against an opponent). For a number of rounds equal to your caster level, the hardness or damage reduction of the touched object or construct is reduced by an amount equal to the level of the highest-level Destruction domain spell you have available to cast. This ability cannot reduce an object's hardness or damage reduction below 0. As a secondary benefit, you gain a +1 insight bonus on all sunder attempts that you make.

name: Freerunner
benefits: You immediately learn up to two movement skill tricks at no cost, and your limit on skill tricks known increases by one.

name: Freezing the Lifeblood

prerequisites.description: Wis 17, Improved Unarmed Strike, Stunning Fist, base attack bonus +10

benefits: Make an unarmed attack that can paralyze a humanoid for 1d4+1 rounds (Fort save DC 10 + 1/2 level + Wis mod). Each use counts as one Stunning Fist attempt.

name: Altitude Adaptation
description: Your body adapts quickly to changes in altitude, preventing you from suffering as much from altitude sickness. You gain a +4 bonus on all Fortitude saving throws to avoid the effects of altitude. Additionally, when you determine what effect the altitude has on you, you apply the effect for the next lower category of altitude than the category you are actually in.

name: Arctic Priest
description: You can swap out prepared spells to cast spells to aid in exploring and surviving in frostfell areas. You can 'lose' any prepared spell that is not a domain spell to cast spells like control weather, create food and water, endure elements, heroes' feast, hibernate, protection from energy, and resist energy.
prerequisites: Access to Cold or Winter cleric domain

name: Beckon the Frozen
description: Creatures you summon are infused with cold energy and have the cold subtype. When you summon a creature using any summon spell, you can opt to summon a version from an extraplanar frostfell. The summoned creature gains the cold subtype, and its natural attacks deal an additional 1d6 points of cold damage.

name: Chosen of Iborighu
description: Your skin has a noticeable blue tint and your left eye is pale blue; these features identify you as an ally to the church of Iborighu and grant you supernatural qualities. Cleric is now a favored class. Once per day, you can cause one creature within 30 feet that meets your gaze to take cold damage equal to your Charisma modifier + 3 and become fatigued (Fortitude negates).

name: Cold Endurance
description: Either because of growing up in a frostfell or training your body and mind to ignore the biting effect of cold, you can exist with ease in low-temperature environments. You can exist comfortably in conditions between 0° F and 90° F without having to make Fortitude saves. You also gain a +2 bonus on saving throws against cold effects.

name: Cold Focus
description: Your cold spells are more potent than normal. Add +1 to the DC for all saving throws against spells you cast with the cold descriptor. This bonus stacks with similar bonuses, such as those granted by Spell Focus and Greater Spell Focus.

name: Cold Spell Specialization
description: You do additional damage with cold spells. In cold areas (temperature at or below 40° F), you gain a +1 bonus per die to any dice rolled to determine damage caused by cold spells you cast. In areas of extreme cold (below –20° F), the damage bonus increases to +2 per die.

name: Craft Skull Talisman
description: You can create skull talismans, which carry spells within themselves. You can create a skull talisman of any spell you know that targets one or more creatures. Whoever destroys the skull is the target of the spell. The art was perfected by neanderthal druids.

name: Faith in the Frost
description: You channel frozen energies from your deity when you turn or rebuke creatures. When you successfully turn or rebuke a creature, it takes cold damage equal to your Charisma modifier as blasts of ice and cold energy tear through its body.
prerequisites: Ability to turn or rebuke creatures, access to Cold or Winter cleric domain

name: Frostfell Prodigy
description: You gain additional bonus spells in cold regions. In cold areas (temperature at or below 40° F), the ability score used to determine how many bonus spells you may prepare or cast is treated as if it were 2 higher. In areas of extreme cold (below –20° F), the ability score is treated as if it were 4 higher.
prerequisites: Con 13, Snowcasting, Frozen Magic, Cold Focus

name: Frozen Berserker
description: When you enter your barbarian rage, your body becomes infused with cold energy. As long as you are under the effects of a barbarian rage, you gain the cold subtype. You gain immunity to cold, but have vulnerability to fire.

name: Frozen Magic
description: Your cold spells are more powerful when you cast them in a cold region. In cold areas (temperature at or below 40° F), spells with the cold descriptor cast by you manifest at caster level +1. In areas of extreme cold (below –20° F), cold spells cast by you manifest at caster level +2.

name: Frozen Wild Shape
description: You can assume the form of magical beasts with the cold subtype. You may use your wild shape ability to assume the form of any magical beast with the cold subtype. Your new form must still fall within the size limitations of your wild shape ability.
prerequisites: Base Fortitude save bonus +6, wild shape ability

name: Greater Cold Focus
description: Your cold spells are now even more potent than before. Add +1 to the DC for all saving throws against spells with the cold descriptor. This bonus stacks with similar bonuses, such as those from Cold Focus, Spell Focus, and Greater Spell Focus.

name: Ice Harmonics
description: You can use your voice to shatter ice. By expending one of your daily uses of bardic music, you can cause any unattended nonmagical ice object or portion of ice within 30 feet to explode violently. Any creature in the 5-foot square takes 2d6 + your Charisma modifier piercing damage. Creatures made of ice take double damage.

name: Icy Calling
description: Your summon spells work better in the frostfell if you summon native creatures. In cold areas (temperature at or below 40° F), creatures native to cold environments and creatures with the cold subtype summoned by you gain a +4 enhancement bonus to Strength and Dexterity. In areas of extreme cold (below –20° F), summoned creatures have maximum hit points.

name: Improved Cold Endurance
description: Your training and natural hardiness have improved your natural resistance to cold temperatures. You gain resistance to cold 5. If you already have resistance to cold, it increases by 5 (maximum resistance to cold 15). You can gain this feat multiple times.
prerequisites: Base Fortitude save bonus +6, Cold Endurance

name: Improved Frosty Touch
description: Your frosty touch causes more cold damage. Your frosty touch ability now deals 2 points of cold damage instead of 1 point.

name: Mark of Hleid
description: You bear a birthmark in the shape of the holy symbol of Hleid somewhere on your body; this mark identifies you as an ally of the church of Hleid and grants you supernatural qualities. You are immune to the frost touch special attack of a rimefire eidolon and can handle rimefire ice barehanded. Cleric is now a favored class. You gain a +2 sacred bonus to AC against evil-aligned creatures with the cold subtype.
prerequisites: Your patron deity must be Hleid

name: Mountaineer
description: You are a particularly gifted explorer and mountain climber. You get a +2 bonus on all Climb and Survival checks.

name: Piercing Cold
description: Your cold spells are so cold that they can damage creatures normally resistant or immune to cold. Piercing cold spells completely ignore any resistance to cold a creature possesses. Creatures normally immune to cold take half damage (or one-quarter on a successful saving throw). A piercing cold spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Primeval Wild Shape
description: Your wild shape forms are stronger than normal. When you assume a wild shape form, you can opt to cause the shape to be a primeval form from the ancient past during a vast ice age. Grants +2 racial bonus to Strength, +2 bonus to natural armor, and resistance to cold 10, but duration is 1 round per druid level instead of 1 hour per druid level.

name: Primitive Caster
description: You use screeches, wild gesticulations, and extra material components to give your spells additional power. For each component (verbal, somatic, or material) you voluntarily add to a spell that doesn't already have it, you increase the effective caster level by +1.

name: Sea Legs
description: You are accustomed to the rolling motion on board a ship. As long as you are on board a ship, you get a +2 bonus on all Balance and Tumble checks, and a +1 bonus on Initiative checks.

name: Smite Fiery Foe
