name: PYRAMID OF AMUN-RE (EL 6)
description: Higher-Order Ability: The temporary hit points you gain from the base ability last for 24 hours. Higher-Order Uses: 6.

name: CRYPT OF BADR AL-MOSAK (EL 7)
description: In the midst of rocky, low-lying hills, a few broken pillars form a circle surrounding a terraced bowl. Stone columns lay scattered and broken within the basin, seeming to point to the sarcophagus at the center of what might have once been an amphitheater. The massive stone crypt stands 10 feet high and is of one piece with the stone upon which it seems to rests. The grand sarcophagus is that of a pharaoh named Badr Al-Mosak. The stone coffin doesn’t open—it is actually a statue. While the area beneath the statue does, in fact, contain haunted crypts and treasures of old, few have ever thought to check and merely believe the ruined amphitheater to be a touchstone site. Initial Encounter: Roll on the Crypt of Badr Al-Mosak Encounters table when the characters visit the site for the first time. Amid the vast desert sands, the last relic of a dead civilization rears from the ashen dunes, four-sided and stately. Surrounded by the broken foundations of a once mighty city, the great pyramid itself seems hardly weathered by the ages. Over 700 feet square at the base and rising to a height of 700 feet, the pyramid’s four surfaces face the Crypt of Badr Al-Mosak Encounters d% Encounter points of the compass. 01–10 Pyrohydra, 5-headed While the pyramid of Amun-Re is reputed to contain 11–50 2 ettin skeletons hidden chambers, trapped galleries, ancient curses, 51–75 Sand dragon, juvenile† guardians, and monsters in its own right, as a whole the 76–97 Flesh golem 98–100 Androsphinx pyramid is also a touchstone site, though few recognize † New monster described on page 152. this fact. name: (EL 8)
description: 4. Hall of Treasures 5. Hall of the First King Higher-Order Ability: Once per week, you can use mass charm monster as a spell-like ability on creatures that share one element of your alignment (chaotic, evil, good, lawful, neutral). The total Hit Dice you can affect is equal to three times the caster level or one creature regardless of Hit Dice. Your caster level is equal to your character level. Higher-Order Uses: 4.

name: SALT STATUARY (EL 7)
description: Base Ability: You gain the Improved Heat Endurance feat. Recharge Condition: You must successfully cast flesh to salt (see page 116) on a living creature within the region. Higher-Order Ability: You can use parching touch (see page 118) as a spell-like ability. Your caster level is equal to your character level. Higher-Order Uses: 12.

name: FIERY SPELL
description: Your fire magic is bolstered, further scorching your enemies. Benefit: A fiery spell deals an extra 1 point of fire damage for each die of damage the spell deals. This feat can be applied only to spells with the fire descriptor. For

name: ETERNAL BREATH OF SENEFERU
description: 2 2 Salt Statuary Encounters d% Encounter 01–26 4 salt mephits 27–50 Brine ooze† 51–70 Behir 71–85 Salt mummy†† 86–100 Waste crawler† † New monsters described in Chapter 6. †† New monster described on page 94. The Eternal Breath of Seneferu is not static—it moves across the face of the desert as a permanent sandstorm. One doesn’t so much find the Eternal Breath as get found by it. However, one can track the Eternal Breath by the trail it leaves in the sand after its passage—the Eternal Breath usually moves only a few feet per hour, though it sometimes surges ahead at a speeds of up to 15 miles per hour (130 feet per round). Seneferu is the name of a wizard who once lived in the desert where the Eternal Breath roams. He sought the heart of the desert, a mystical force that drives desertification into living lands. Legend records that he found it in a tomb buried by the sands (some say buried in a divine sandstorm that lasted a year and a day). Only a few know of the Eternal Breath’s touchstone qualities. These creatures can call to Seneferu. If such seekers are sufficiently deep into the desert, the Eternal Breath responds, arriving 1d4 days from the moment it was first called. The Eternal Breath of Seneferu manifests as a sandstorm (see Sandstorms, page 16). Unlike a standard sandstorm, fell creatures move within the gritty winds of the Eternal Breath, immune to its biting sand. They attack anything they find within the storm. Initial Encounter: Roll on the Eternal Breath of Seneferu Encounters table when the characters track down the roving sandstorm for the first time. A great crack in the earth opened up a buried salt deposit, exposing the crystals to the elements. Staggered protrusions of the mineral jut from the broken surface, and strange forms of gleaming salt lie exposed in places weather cannot reach. They resemble statues of living things, but the forms are of creatures known in no history. They might be religious carvings or unfortunate beings transmuted to salt. If the characters wait 51–75 Death scarab swarm† 76–97 Mohrg a year or longer to visit the chasm, roll for an encounter 98–100 Elder xorn as if they had never visited the location. † New monster described on page 184.

name: HEAT ENDURANCE
description: Either as a result of growing up in the waste, or by training your body and mind to ignore the effects of searing heat, you can exist with ease in high-temperature environments. Benefit: You gain a +2 bonus on saving throws against fire effects. You can exist comfortably in temperatures up to 120° F without having to make Fortitude saves (see Heat Dangers, page 12). Your protection against heat is level 1 (see Protection against Heat, page 14).

name: IMPROVED HEAT ENDURANCE
description: You can survive even in the most extreme natural heat conditions. Benefit: You gain fire resistance 5. If you already have fire resistance, it increases by 5. You can exist comfortably in temperatures up to 160° F without having to make Fortitude saves (see Heat Dangers, page 12). Your protection against heat is level 3 (see Protection against Heat, page 14).

name: JUDGED BY AURIFAR
description: Aurifar, the Caliph of the Sky, has judged you, and he now shows you special favor. at least three days in the waste without water. Benefit: You gain a +2 sacred bonus on Constitution checks to avoid the negative effects of thirst (see Dehydration, page 15). You gain a +2 sacred bonus to your Armor Class against undead creatures that are adversely affected by sunlight, such as vampires and wraiths. Cleric is now an additional favored class for you; the cleric class does not count when determining whether you take an experience point penalty for multiclassing. Special: Your aura shows faint abjuration magic. If you ever lose favor with Aurifar, or change your patron deity to another deity, you lose the benefit of this feat, and you immediately begin experiencing the effects of thirst as
prerequisites: Patron deity Aurifar, must have survived

name: Sapphire Fist
description: You can invest essentia to enhance your unarmed strikes.
prerequisites: Improved Unarmed Strike, ability to invest essentia

name: Sapphire Smite
description: You can invest essentia to enhance your smite ability.
prerequisites: Smite ability, ability to invest essentia

name: Sapphire Sprint
description: You can invest essentia to increase your base land speed.

name: Savage Grapple
benefits: You can deal sneak attack damage when grappling in wild shape form.

name: Savvy Rogue
benefits: Based on the rogue special abilities you have, you gain one or more additional special benefits: Crippling Strike (deal Strength damage even to targets immune to sneak attacks), Defensive Roll (use three times per day), Improved Evasion (+2 competence bonus on Reflex saves), Opportunist (use as many times per round as you can make attacks of opportunity), Skill Mastery (treat the die roll as a 12 instead of 10), Slippery Mind (+2 competence bonus on the extra save).

name: Scavenging Gullet
description: The taint of the aberration in your blood has gifted you with the ability to gain nourishment from things that others would never consider as food. You gain nourishment from eating any organic material. You gain a +4 racial bonus on Fortitude saves to resist ingested poisons and diseases caused by ingested substances.

name: Scent
benefits: You can spend one use of your wild shape ability to gain the scent special quality for 1 hour.

name: Scorching Sirocco
description: Advanced Desert Wind fire tactics

name: Scourge of the Seas
description: You can make an Intimidate check to daunt the captain of another ship who can see you or your distinctive colors. If successful, the target is frightened for as long as they can see you and for 1d6x10 minutes afterward.

name: Scribe Epic Scroll
benefits: You can scribe scrolls containing epic spells.

name: Scribe Tattoo
benefits: You can create psionic tattoos (psionic versions of potions).

name: Sculpt Spell
benefits: You can alter area spells so that they fill unusual shapes. A sculpted spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Sea Legs
description: As long as you are on board a ship, you get a +2 bonus on Balance and Tumble checks, and a +1 bonus on initiative checks.

name: Self-Concealment
benefits: You have a 10% miss chance due to your incredible ability to anticipate and avoid attacks.

name: Shadow Blade
description: Add Dex to damage in Shadow Hand stance

name: Shape Soulmeld
description: You can shape one specific soulmeld.

name: Shards of Granite
description: Advanced Stone Dragon power tactics

name: Share Soulmeld
description: You can share the benefits of your soulmelds with your animal companion or familiar.
prerequisites: Animal companion or familiar, ability to shape soulmelds

name: Sharp-Shooting

prerequisites.description: Point Blank Shot, Precise Shot, base attack bonus +3

benefits: Halve your opponent's cover bonus.

name: Shattering Strike
benefits: When you attack an object or strike a held object while raging, you automatically ignore 10 points of hardness.

name: Shield Charge

prerequisites.description: Improved Shield Bash, base attack bonus +3

benefits: Make a free trip attack with your shield during a charge.

name: Shield Slam

prerequisites.description: Improved Shield Bash, Shield Charge, base attack bonus +6

benefits: Use your shield to daze an opponent.

name: Ship's Mage
description: Add +1 to the caster level of all spells cast while you are aboard a ship that is familiar to you. In addition, spells you cast while aboard a ship that is familiar to you deal no damage to that ship. It takes one week to become familiar with a ship.

name: Sidestep Charge
benefits: You gain +4 dodge bonus to AC against charge attacks.

name: Silencing Strike
benefits: Whenever you deal sneak attack damage to an opponent, you can forgo 2d6 of that damage to silence the target (as the silence spell, except it affects only the target creature) for 1 round.

name: Sly Fortune
benefits: You can expend one luck reroll as an immediate action to reroll a Hide, Move Silently, or Tumble check. You gain one luck reroll per day.

name: Sneak Attack of Opportunity
benefits: Any time an opponent would provoke an attack of opportunity from you, you may instead make a sneak attack (if the opponent would otherwise be vulnerable to sneak attack).

name: Soul of the North
benefits: An innate talent for magic grants you the following spell-like abilities as a 1st-level caster: 1/day—chill touch, ray of frost, resistance.

name: Soulsight
description: You can invest essentia to gain the ability to detect incarnum auras.

name: Soultouched Spellcasting
description: You can convert spell slots into essentia.
prerequisites: Ability to cast spells, ability to invest essentia

name: Sound of Silence
benefits: As a standard action, you can expend two daily uses of your bardic music ability to deafen a single target for 3 rounds. A successful Will save (using your Perform check result as the DC) negates the effect. The target must be within 30 feet of you and be able to hear you.

name: Spectral Strike
benefits: Your unarmed strikes can deal damage to incorporeal creatures normally.

name: Speed of Thought
benefits: While you are psionically focused and wearing light or no armor, you gain a +10 foot enhancement bonus to your land speed.

name: Spell Focus (Evocation)
description: +1 to DC for Evocation spells.
benefits: Add +1 to the Difficulty Class for all saving throws against spells from the school of Evocation that you cast.

name: Spell Hand
benefits: An innate talent for magic grants you the following spell-like abilities as a 1st-level caster: 1/day—mage hand, open/close, Tenser's floating disk.

name: Spell Knowledge
benefits: You learn two new spells of any level you can cast. These must be taken from the same class spell list.

name: Spell Opportunity
benefits: When an opponent provokes an attack of opportunity, you may cast a spell at them instead of making a melee attack.

name: Spiritual Counter

prerequisites.description: Any other divine feat, ability to turn or rebuke undead

benefits: As a standard (readied) action, you can expend one or more turn or rebuke undead attempts to counter another caster's spell, as though you had cast the same spell yourself. You must spend a number of daily uses equal to 2 + the level of the spell you wish to counter (minimum 1) and be able to cast that spell as if it were on your spell list.

name: Split Psionic Ray
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can split a ray power to fire two rays, each at a different target. Each ray deals half damage. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 2.

name: Split Ray
benefits: You can affect two targets with a single ray spell. The targets must be within 30 feet of each other, and you must make a separate attack roll against each. A split ray spell uses up a spell slot two levels higher than the spell's actual level. Area effect spells and spells that don't require attack rolls can't be split.

name: Spontaneous Domains

prerequisites.description: Ability to cast 3rd-level spells, access to two or more cleric domains

benefits: When preparing your spells for the day, you can leave your domain slots open. You can then choose, when the situation arises, to cast any of the domain spells you could normally have prepared for a given level. However, you are still limited to one domain spell per level per day.

name: Spontaneous Spell
benefits: You may spontaneously convert one prepared spell to cast any spell you know of the same level (like a cleric converting to cure spells).

name: Staggering Strike
benefits: When you deal sneak attack damage to an opponent, you can also limit it to a single action (standard, move, or swift) for 1 round.

name: Stand Still
benefits: When a foe's movement provokes an attack of opportunity from you, you can make an attack. If you hit, the foe must stop moving (DC = damage dealt).

name: Starspawn
description: You grow membranous wings and are comfortable in extreme elevations. You gain a fly speed (average maneuverability) equal to one-half your base land speed (round down to nearest 5 feet). You can use your flight for a number of consecutive rounds equal to 1 + your Constitution modifier (minimum 1 round). You gain resistance to cold 5 and are immune to altitude fatigue and altitude sickness.
prerequisites: Aberration Blood, one other aberrant feat

name: Stealthy Bones
description: Skeletons you create are more difficult to detect.
prerequisites: Corpsecrafter, ability to cast animate dead

name: Steam Magic
description: You can cast fire spells into water without a Spellcraft check, causing terrible gouts of scalding steam instead of extinguishing the effect.

name: Stone Form
benefits: You can use your wild shape ability to take the form of a Small, Medium, or Large earth elemental.

name: Stone Power
description: Trade attack for temp HP (like Power Attack)

name: Stone Rage
benefits: While you rage, you gain a +1 bonus to your natural armor.

name: Storm of Throws
benefits: As a full-round action, you can throw a light weapon at each opponent within 30 feet.

name: Storm Magic
description: Spells you cast that affect storms gain +1 caster level.

name: Stormguard Warrior
description: Advanced Iron Heart weapon tactics

name: Strength Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can bypass hardness with your melee attacks for 1 minute. In addition, you gain a slam attack as a natural weapon, and all your melee attacks (natural or not) gain the adamantine property for the purpose of overcoming damage reduction. Your slam attack deals damage based on your size and character level. If you already have a natural weapon, use whichever damage value is higher and gain a +2 circumstance bonus on any damage rolls you make with that weapon.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each daily turn or rebuke use you expend.

name: Subsonics
benefits: You can produce bardic music effects very softly. Creatures more than 20 feet away from you cannot hear your bardic music.

name: Sudden Empower
benefits: Once per day, you can apply the Empower Spell feat to any spell you cast without increasing the level of the spell slot used or specially preparing the spell ahead of time.

name: Sudden Extend
benefits: Once per day, you can apply the Extend Spell feat to any spell you cast without increasing the level of the spell slot used or specially preparing the spell ahead of time.

name: Sudden Maximize
benefits: Once per day, you can apply the Maximize Spell feat to any spell you cast without increasing the level of the spell slot used or specially preparing the spell ahead of time.

name: Sudden Quicken

prerequisites.description: Quicken Spell, Sudden Empower, Sudden Extend, Sudden Maximize, Sudden Silent, Sudden Still

benefits: Once per day, you can apply the Quicken Spell feat to any spell you cast without increasing the level of the spell slot used or specially preparing the spell ahead of time.

name: Sudden Silent
benefits: Once per day, you can apply the Silent Spell feat to any spell you cast without increasing the level of the spell slot used or specially preparing the spell ahead of time.

name: Sudden Still
benefits: Once per day, you can apply the Still Spell feat to any spell you cast without increasing the level of the spell slot used or specially preparing the spell ahead of time.

name: Sudden Widen
benefits: Once per day, you can apply the Widen Spell feat to any spell you cast without increasing the level of the spell slot used or specially preparing the spell ahead of time.

name: Sun Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can cause one of your melee weapons to glow with the power of the sun. The illumination radius is the same as that of a torch, but the light is true sunlight and affects creatures within a 10-foot radius as such. This effect lasts for 1 minute. While your weapon glows, it deals an additional 1 point of sacred (if your deity is good or neutral) or profane (if your deity is evil) damage per character level you possess to any undead it strikes.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each daily turn or rebuke use you expend.

name: Sunken Song
description: You can produce bardic music effects underwater, despite the difficulty of singing or playing instruments in such an environment.

name: Superior Initiative
benefits: You get a +8 bonus on initiative checks (stacks with Improved Initiative for +12 total).

name: Superior Unarmed Strike
description: Improved unarmed damage

name: Supernatural Instincts
description: Creature using a supernatural ability provokes attack of opportunity from you
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Sure Hand
benefits: You immediately learn up to two manipulation skill tricks at no cost, and your limit on skill tricks known increases by one.

name: Survivor's Luck
benefits: You can expend one luck reroll as an immediate action to reroll a saving throw you just failed. You gain one luck reroll per day.

name: Swarm of Arrows
benefits: As a full-round action, you can fire an arrow at each opponent within 30 feet of a point you designate.

name: Swarmfighting

prerequisites.description: Small size, Dex 13, base attack bonus +1

benefits: Occupy same square as allies with this feat, gain +1 morale bonus per ally (up to Dex bonus).

name: Sweet Talker
benefits: You immediately learn up to two interaction skill tricks at no cost, and your limit on skill tricks known increases by one.

name: Swift Ambusher
benefits: Your rogue and scout levels stack for the purpose of determining the extra damage and bonus to Armor Class granted when skirmishing. In addition, you can qualify for ambush feats as if your sneak attack bonus damage were the sum of your skirmish damage and sneak attack bonus damage. You cannot sacrifice skirmish extra damage to use those feats, however.

name: Swift Call
benefits: You can call your special mount as a swift action.

name: Swift Hunter
benefits: Your ranger and scout levels stack for the purpose of determining the extra damage and bonus to Armor Class granted when skirmishing. Your ranger and scout levels also stack for the purpose of determining when you select additional favored enemies, as well as the total bonus granted against your favored enemies. In addition, your skirmish extra damage applies against any creature you have selected as a favored enemy, even if it is normally immune to extra damage from critical hits or skirmish attacks.

name: Swift Wild Shape

prerequisites.description: Dex 13, Fast Wild Shape, wild shape class feature

benefits: You can activate your wild shape ability as a swift action.

name: Swim-By Attack
description: When swimming, you can take a move action and another standard action (such as an attack) at any point during the move.

name: Tactile Trapsmith
benefits: You add your Dexterity modifier instead of your Intelligence modifier to Search and Disable Device checks.

name: Talented
benefits: When you overchannel for a +1 bonus on manifester level, you take no damage.

name: Tempting Fate
benefits: You can expend a luck reroll to reroll a stabilization check. In addition, once per day, whenever you have at least 1 hit point remaining and would be dealt enough damage to kill you, you can expend one luck reroll as an immediate action to take only enough damage to reduce you to –9 hit points. You automatically stabilize. You gain one luck reroll per day. Unlike most other luck feats, using Tempting Fate requires no action.

name: Tenacious Magic
benefits: Choose one spell you can cast. The DC to dispel or counter that spell increases by 10.

name: Terrifying Rage
benefits: While in a rage, you can make an Intimidate check to demoralize all foes within 30 feet as a free action.

name: Third Time's the Charm
benefits: You can expend one luck reroll as an immediate action to use the granted power of the Luck domain an additional time per day. You can only use this benefit immediately after using the Luck domain's granted power (in effect, this feat gives you a third chance to succeed on the roll). You gain one luck reroll per day.

name: Thrall Bred
description: You were spawned in the breeding pits of the mind flayers or the beholders. When you are within 30 feet of your designated special charge, you gain a +1 morale bonus on damage rolls and saving throws. If your special charge is not within 30 feet, or is dead or incapacitated, you take a -2 morale penalty. You can designate a special charge only once per month. Your charge must have more Hit Dice than you.

name: Thrall to Demon
description: You formally become a supplicant to a demon lord. In return for your obedience, you gain a small measure of that demon lord's power. Once per day, while performing an evil act, you can call upon your demonic patron and gain a +1 luck bonus on any one attack roll, saving throw, ability check, skill check, or level check.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Throat Punch
benefits: Your successful sneak attack delivered with an unarmed strike temporarily hinders the target's ability to speak. For the next 3 rounds, the target takes a –5 penalty on any skill check requiring speech and has a 50% chance of failure when casting a spell with a verbal component or activating a magic item with a command word. Using this feat reduces your sneak attack damage by 2d6. You must be able to reach your foe's neck to use this feat.

name: Throw Anything

prerequisites.description: Dex 15, proficiency with weapon, base attack bonus +2

benefits: Throw any melee weapon you are proficient with as a ranged weapon with 10 ft. range increment.

name: Thundering Rage
benefits: While in a rage, each of your melee attacks deals +1d8 sonic damage.

name: Titan Fighting
benefits: You can designate any opponent at least one size category larger than you as a dodge target. You gain your racial dodge bonus to Armor Class against that creature's attacks.

name: Tomb-Tainted Soul
description: Your soul is tainted by the negative energy of undeath. You are healed by negative energy and harmed by positive energy as if you were undead.

name: Toothed Blow
description: Your unarmed strikes avoid the usual underwater penalties for bludgeoning weapons.

name: Touch of Healing
benefits: As long as you have a conjuration (healing) spell of 2nd level or higher available to cast, you can spend a standard action to touch a target creature and heal 3 points of damage per level of the highest-level conjuration (healing) spell you have available to cast. You can use this ability only on a target that has been reduced to one-half or fewer of its total hit points. The effect ends once you've healed the subject up to half its normal maximum hit points. As a secondary benefit, you gain a +1 competence bonus to your caster level when casting conjuration (healing) spells.

name: Touch Spell Specialization
benefits: You get a +2 bonus on damage rolls with touch spells.

name: Toughness
description: +3 hit points.
benefits: You gain +3 hit points.

name: Transdimensional Spell
benefits: A transdimensional spell affects creatures and objects on the Material Plane, even if you are on the Ethereal Plane, and vice versa. Likewise, a transdimensional spell affects creatures and objects in any extradimensional space regardless of where you are. A transdimensional spell uses up a spell slot one level higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Trap Sense
benefits: You gain a +10 bonus on Search checks to find traps and on Reflex saves to avoid traps.

name: Travel Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a swift action, you can activate this ability to move up to your speed as a swift action each round. Thus, you can move your speed and then take a full-round action, or move and take two other actions. This effect lasts for 1 minute.
special: You cannot take a 5-foot step in the same round that you use this feat to move as a swift action.
You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each two daily turn or rebuke uses you expend.

name: Trickery Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a standard action, you can create an exact duplicate of yourself up to 30 feet away. You can control this simulacrum's movements as a free action. The image becomes more real as you advance in level. This ability is usable up to a maximum of 1 minute per level each day. The simulacrum combines the characteristics of the silent image and unseen servant spells. At 5th level, it behaves more like a major image spell. At 10th level, you can spend a swift action to transfer your perceptions to the simulacrum. At 15th level, the image can become more real at your command and can perform combat actions using phantom versions of your gear.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each three daily turn or rebuke uses you expend.

name: Trivial Knowledge
benefits: Whenever you make a Knowledge check or a bardic knowledge check, you can roll twice and take the higher result.

name: Twin Power
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can manifest a power twice in the same round. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 6.

name: Twin Spell
benefits: You can simultaneously cast a single spell twice. The spell must be targeted on one or more creatures, with a range greater than touch, and affect a number of targets equal to or less than your caster level. A twin spell uses up a spell slot four levels higher than the spell's actual level.

name: Two-Weapon Rend
benefits: If you hit an opponent with weapons in both hands in the same round, you deal additional damage equal to 1d6 + 1.5 times your Strength modifier.

name: Umbral Shroud
benefits: As long as you have a 3rd-level or higher darkness spell available to cast, shadows and darkness appear to obey your will. As a standard action, you can direct these shadows to obscure the vision of one foe within 30 feet. If your target fails a Will save, its attacks have a miss chance equal to 5% per level of the highest-level darkness spell you have available to cast. This effect lasts until the beginning of your next action. As a secondary benefit, you gain darkvision out to 10 feet. If you already have darkvision, its range increases by 10 feet.

name: Unavoidable Strike
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can resolve your unarmed strike or natural weapon attack as a touch attack.

name: Unbelievable Luck
benefits: As long as you have at least one luck reroll remaining for the day, you gain a +2 luck bonus on whichever of your saves has the lowest base bonus. If two or more of your saves tie for the lowest base bonus, choose when you select this feat which save it applies to. If your base save bonuses later change so that the chosen save no longer has the lowest base bonus, the luck bonus from this feat immediately applies to the save that now has the lowest base bonus. You gain two luck rerolls per day.

name: Uncanny Accuracy
benefits: Your ranged attacks ignore the miss chance granted by concealment, but you still can't attack creatures with total concealment.

name: Unconditional Power
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can manifest a power even when dazed, confused, nauseated, shaken, or stunned. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 8.

name: Undead Mastery
benefits: You can command up to 10 times your character level in HD of undead (rather than the normal 4 times your level).

name: Undead Leadership
description: You can attract and command undead followers.
prerequisites: Ability to rebuke or command undead, character level 6th

name: Underfoot Combat
benefits: You gain a +4 dodge bonus to AC against attacks of opportunity provoked by moving through a larger opponent's space.

name: Undo Resistance
description: Deal sneak attack with cold iron weapon and reduce a creature's spell resistance
prerequisites: Sneak attack, sudden strike, or skirmish ability
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Unholy Strike
benefits: Your melee attacks are treated as evil-aligned weapons, dealing +2d6 damage against good creatures.

name: Up the Walls
benefits: While you are psionically focused, you can run on walls or ceilings as part of a run action. Must end movement on horizontal surface.

name: Vengeful Surge
description: When you save against a spell or a spell-like or supernatural ability, gain +2 on damage against creature that targeted you for 1 round
source: Fiendish Codex II: Tyrants of the Nine Hells

name: Venom's Gift

prerequisites.description: Any two wild feats, wild shape class feature, ability to assume plant form using wild shape

benefits: As a standard action, you can expend one daily use of your wild shape ability to envenom your natural attacks for up to 1 round per caster level you possess. An ordinary unarmed strike does not qualify for this benefit; you must have a true natural attack. Poison: Injury, Fortitude negates (DC 10 + 1/2 your HD + your Con modifier), 1d2 Str/1d2 Str.

name: Versatile Learner
benefits: Choose one cross-class skill. That skill becomes a class skill for you.
special: This feat may only be taken at 1st level.

name: Versatile Performer
benefits: Treat all Perform skills as if they had ranks equal to your highest Perform rank.

name: Vestigial Wings
description: A pair of vestigial wings sprouts from your shoulders. Your wings aren't formed enough to allow true flight, but they do enhance your ability to jump. You gain a bonus on Jump checks equal to +3 per Abyssal heritor feat you possess. Your wings can also slow your fall. As long as you can take move actions, you can control a fall so that you land without taking damage.
source: Fiendish Codex I: Hordes of the Abyss

name: Vicious Claws
description: Undead you create have more dangerous natural attacks.
prerequisites: Corpsecrafter, ability to cast animate dead or create undead

name: Victor's Luck
benefits: You can expend one luck reroll as a swift action to reroll a critical threat confirmation roll. You gain one luck reroll per day.

name: Wandstrike
benefits: You can make a touch attack with a wand to deal 1d6 damage and simultaneously target the struck creature with the wand's spell effect.

name: War Devotion
benefits: Once per day, when fighting defensively as a standard or full-round action, you take a -3 penalty on all attack rolls in a round and gain a +3 dodge bonus to AC in the same round. When you attain 7th level, your penalty on attack rolls drops to -2 and your dodge bonus increases to +4. When you attain 15th level, your penalty on attack rolls drops to -1 and your dodge bonus increases to +5. This bonus stacks with the bonus to AC granted by the Combat Expertise feat. This benefit is an extraordinary ability.
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each three daily turn or rebuke uses you expend.

name: Warning Shout
benefits: As an immediate action, you can expend two daily uses of your bardic music ability to grant a single ally (other than yourself) a +5 morale bonus on her next Reflex save and evasion. The ally must be within 30 feet of you and able to see or hear you. The effect lasts until the target rolls a Reflex save or until the start of your turn, whichever comes first.

name: Warped Mind
description: Your tainted form has altered the physical nature of your brain, making you resistant to mental effects. You gain a racial bonus on Will saves against mind-affecting spells and abilities equal to one-half the number of aberrant feats you possess. You gain 1 psionic power point for each aberrant feat you possess.

name: Water Devotion
benefits: Once per day as a standard action, you can pour the contents of a full waterskin on the ground and summon forth a water elemental on that spot. The creature remains and follows your commands for 1 minute. The size of the elemental is based on your character level: 1st-5th (Small), 6th-10th (Medium), 11th-15th (Large), 16th-20th (Huge).
special: You can select this feat multiple times, gaining one additional daily use each time you take it.
If you have the ability to turn or rebuke undead, you gain one additional daily use of this feat for each daily turn or rebuke use you expend.

name: Water Adaptation
description: You can breathe water and air equally well, and gain a swim speed of 20 feet.

name: Waterspawn
description: You have prominent fins and are supremely well adapted to the icy deeps. You gain a Swim speed equal to your land speed (granting +8 racial bonus on Swim checks, ability to take 10 on any Swim check, and ability to use run action while swimming). You gain resistance to cold 5 and can breathe air and water with equal ease.
prerequisites: Aberration Blood, one other aberrant feat

name: Weakening Touch

prerequisites.description: Wis 17, Improved Unarmed Strike, Stunning Fist, base attack bonus +2

benefits: Make an unarmed attack that deals no damage but applies -6 penalty to target's Strength for 1 minute. Each use counts as one Stunning Fist attempt.

name: Weapon Focus
description: +1 bonus on attack rolls with one type of weapon.
benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on all attack rolls you make using the selected weapon.

name: Weapon Focus (Bow)
description: +1 bonus on attack rolls with longbow or shortbow.
benefits: You gain a +1 bonus on all attack rolls you make using a longbow or shortbow.

name: Weapon Specialization
description: +2 bonus on damage rolls with one type of weapon.
benefits: You gain a +2 bonus on all damage rolls you make using the selected weapon.

name: White Raven Defense
description: AC bonus in White Raven stance with allies

name: Widen Power
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus, you can double a power's area. Using this feat increases the power point cost by 4.

name: Wild Talent
benefits: You gain 2 power points and the ability to manifest 0-level psionic powers (if you know any). This makes you a psionic character.

name: Windsinger
description: You can use bardic music to alter the wind's direction or intensity, helping ships avoid battles or navigate more effectively.
prerequisites: Bardic music, Perform (sing or wind instruments) 5 ranks

name: Winged Warrior
benefits: You gain advantages in aerial combat. See feat description for full details.

name: Wounding Attack
benefits: When you expend your psionic focus and make a successful melee attack, your opponent takes 1 point of Constitution damage in addition to normal damage.

name: Yondalla's Sense
benefits: Add your Wisdom bonus (if any) to your initiative checks.

name: Zen Archery
benefits: Use Wisdom modifier instead of Dexterity for ranged attack rolls.

name: Zone of Animation
benefits: You can use a rebuke undead attempt to animate dead in a 20-foot radius, as per the animate dead spell but with no material component cost.

name: Two-Weapon Fighting
benefits: Your penalties on attack rolls for fighting with two weapons are reduced. The penalty for your primary hand lessens by 2 and the one for your off hand lessens by 6.

name: Improved Two-Weapon Fighting
benefits: In addition to the standard single extra attack you get with an off-hand weapon, you get a second attack with it, albeit at a -5 penalty.

name: Greater Two-Weapon Fighting
benefits: You get a third attack with your off-hand weapon, albeit at a -10 penalty.

name: Natural Spell
benefits: You can complete the verbal and somatic components of spells while in wild shape. You substitute various noises and gestures for the normal verbal and somatic components of a spell. You can also use any material components or focuses you possess, even if such items are melded within your current form. This feat does not permit the use of magic items while you are in a form that could not ordinarily use them, and you do not gain the ability to speak while in wild shape.
